title: STATUS 20A White Waterproof 4 Terminal Electrical Junction Box - (20SRJBX4)
features: Status 20A waterproof connector for outdoor installations Status delivers a weather-resistant 4 terminal connector designed for safe electrical wiring in outdoor or damp environments. Ideal for gardens, sheds, garages or utility spaces needing protected connections.

IP rated for water and moisture protection Built with a sealed design, this waterproof unit prevents ingress from water, dust or condensation. Provides a secure, weatherproof solution for lighting circuits, garden power or external cable extensions.

4 terminal layout for flexible wiring setups Equipped with four sturdy terminals for joining or splitting cables, this box supports multiple configurations and is suitable for domestic outdoor appliances, low-voltage lighting or garden equipment.

White housing with secure screw terminals Encased in a clean white plastic body, the terminals offer reliable grip via screw connections to ensure safe current flow. Designed to resist corrosion and provide long-term stability in exposed areas.

Quick installation for competent DIY or professional use Compatible with standard tools and mounting methods, this connector box is ideal for electricians or DIY users. Can be installed to fences, walls or posts with minimal effort for safe, waterproof cable management.
description: Product Description Status 20 Amp junction box is ideal for lighting, garden features, power tools, pond equipment etc. Long working time. Easy to installation and safe operation. Suitable for industrial and commercial uses. It is constructed of high-quality materials for long-lasting durability. Recyclable materials. CE certified. Supplied in poly bag. High Standards of quality and conformity form the corner stone of our policy resulting in the continual growth of Status International. Box Contains 1x Junction Box
